title: Recruitment & Staffing Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: InCorp Vietnam's Recruitment & Staffing services help companies build strong teams through two focused solutions: Executive Search and Mass Recruitment

hero.title: Recruitment & Staffing Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Scale your business with the right people at the right time through tailored to Vietnam's talent market. From leadership hiring to high volume workforce expansion, InCorp Vietnam helps businesses identify, attract and secure the talent they need to grow efficiently in Vietnam.

sections.heading: Benefits to expect from our Recruitment & Staffing services
sections.subtitle: Vietnam's labor market is evolving quickly. Companies today face growing pressure to hire faster, compete for quality talent and build teams that can support expansion

sections.heading: How We Support Your Hiring Needs in Vietnam
body: InCorp Vietnam's Recruitment & Staffing team supports businesses with practical hiring solutions aligned with business goals, role requirements and market realities. We combine market understanding, targeted search and structured screening to help companies reduce hiring risk and improve talent outcomes.

sections.heading: Executive Search
body: For companies hiring senior leaders, functional heads and highly specialized professionals. We identify candidates who bring the right leadership capability, technical expertise, and long term fit.

items: C suite and senior leadership hiring
Department heads and country management roles
Specialized roles requiring niche market knowledge
Support through offer stage and hiring coordination

sections.heading: Staffing Services
body: For companies that require flexible workforce solutions across temporary, project-based, and full-time positions. We manage candidate sourcing, screening, interview coordination, and preparation and administration of labor contracts in legal compliance, along with payroll processing, including salary calculation, statutory deductions, PIT handling, social insurance reporting, and monthly payslip issuance, ensuring accuracy, confidentiality and timely delivery.

items: Rapid workforce deployment for operational needs
Candidate sourcing, screening and interview coordination
Preparation and administration of labor contracts in legal compliance
Payroll processing including salary calculation, statutory deductions, PIT and social insurance reporting
Payslip issuance and workforce administration support

items.title: Understand Your Hiring Needs
items.desc: We align on business goals, role scope, hiring urgency, and candidate requirements.

items.title: Build the Right Search Strategy
items.desc: We define the sourcing plan, candidate profile, and recruitment timeline based on your market and hiring goals.

items.title: Source and Screen Candidates
items.desc: We identify suitable candidates through targeted channels and conduct structured screening before shortlist submission.

items.title: Coordinate Interviews & Selection
items.desc: We support the interview process, candidate communication, and feedback alignment.

items.title: Support Offer & Hiring Closure
items.desc: We help clients move from selection to offer stage with better speed and candidate experience.

sections.heading: Meet Our Expert
body: Ken Nguyen — Head of Recruitment & Staffing

With over 15 years of experience in HR solutions, talent acquisition and workforce outsourcing across multinational and regional organizations, Ken leads the development of InCorp Vietnam's Recruitment & Staffing services – helping foreign-invested enterprises and growing businesses access qualified talent and scale their workforce efficiently.

items.q: What is the difference between Executive Search and Mass Recruitment?
items.a: Executive Search focuses on senior, strategic, or highly specialized roles where a targeted search process is needed. Mass Recruitment focuses on hiring larger volumes of employees efficiently for operational or expansion needs.

items.q: Can you support foreign companies hiring in Vietnam?
items.a: Yes. We support foreign invested companies and international businesses that need local hiring support, market insight, and practical recruitment coordination in Vietnam.
We support hiring across a wide range of sectors depending on role type, business model and workforce needs.

items.q: Can you help us hire both leadership and operational teams?
items.a: Yes. Our Recruitment & Staffing practice is designed to support both senior level hiring and broader workforce expansion.

items.q: How long does a recruitment project take?
items.a: Timelines depend on the role, hiring volume, market conditions, and urgency. We align the hiring plan with your business timeline and talent requirements.

items.q: Can your team support hiring during market entry or business expansion?
items.a: Yes. We support recruitment for market entry, new site launches, team build outs and growth stage hiring in Vietnam.
